title: Cold-start bootstrap; 3-variant GPT upload prompt (analysis/impl/design)
public_claim: Cold-start bootstrap; 3-variant GPT upload prompt (analysis/impl/design) is a preserved project packet for this is a meta-package: a thin operator-facing wrapper around the governing replacement archive plus two earlier preparation passes.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Cold-start bootstrap; 3-variant GPT upload prompt (analysis/impl/design), so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
